metadata.license: CC-BY-SA 4.0 (FrequencyWords content); MIT (FrequencyWords code). Data derived from OpenSubtitles parallel corpus.
metadata.corpus: Word frequencies from OpenSubtitles 2018 Japanese subtitle corpus. Covers spoken/media Japanese: movies, TV drama, anime. Pre-tokenized by OpenSubtitles; matched against JMdict vocabulary (51,557 surface forms) to filter tokenization noise. 8,598 of 33,910 raw entries matched.
metadata.attribution: Frequency data from FrequencyWords by Hermit Dave (https://github.com/hermitdave/FrequencyWords, CC-BY-SA 4.0), derived from the OpenSubtitles parallel corpus (https://www.opensubtitles.org/). Matched against JMdict vocabulary for quality filtering.

field_notes.text: Primary writing of the word (kanji or kana, matching a words.json entry).
field_notes.reading: Primary kana reading of the word.
field_notes.rank: Rank by subtitle occurrence count. 1 = most frequent in subtitles.
field_notes.count: Raw occurrence count in the OpenSubtitles 2018 Japanese corpus.
field_notes.methodology: Pre-counted frequencies from OpenSubtitles, filtered to entries matching known JMdict vocabulary. Tokenization is upstream (OpenSubtitles); we match surface forms against words.json kanji writings and kana readings. Reflects spoken/media register, not written/formal register — complements frequency-newspaper.json (kanji) and frequency-corpus.json (Tatoeba sentences).
